response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music present; audio consists entirely of a spoken merchandise presentation by Hakos Baelz. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON confirmed the absence of vocal music; utilized manual transcription and translation for 100% of the spoken dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps precisely anchored to vocal bursts; aggressive end-time truncation applied for rapid-fire excitement and seamless transitions between English and Japanese speech segments. Included prominent on-screen merchandise titles as subtitles during their respective showcases.
